items.title: Worth a try
items.summary:
Art:5/5
Difficulty(at first):2/5
Difficulty(after ch7):4.5/5
Story plot: 3/5(only the beginning and ending was good)
Design: 5+
Music: 5/5
P2w requirements: 4/5(unless you don’t fight challenging modes)

Just got lv90 today so I think this comment is worth and truthy for those who are still compensating whether to play or not~ :)
items.author: Typrics
